Title: Contact form with name, email, subject, and message fields
Preconditions: User is on the ParcelPro Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the ParcelPro Contact Us page
2. Interact with the relevant page elements
3. Perform the main action described in the scenario
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: The action completes successfully with the expected outcome displayed.

Title: Form validation for all required fields
Preconditions: User is on the ParcelPro Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the ParcelPro Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: Inline validation messages are displayed for each empty mandatory field.

Title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility compliance
Preconditions: User is on the ParcelPro Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the ParcelPro Contact Us page
2. Navigate through all form fields using the keyboard (Tab key)
3. Verify all labels and ARIA attributes are present
4. Check colour contrast and focus indicators
5. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: All form elements are accessible via keyboard, labels are correctly associated, and WCAG contrast ratios are met.
